case_title: SPARK ARTS, LLC VS. BEYOND JUST TAX, INC. et al.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-15-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO DEC-10-2018 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF SPARK ARTS, LLC REPRESENTED BY . DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY SPARK ARTS, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT BEYOND JUST TAX, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SPARK ARTS, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BEYOND JUST TAX, INC. $4,128.99 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,218.99 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
